title: begonia tenasserimensis
intro: Begonia tenasserimensis, also known as Begonia tenasserimensis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Begonia tenasserimensis include reducing pain and inflammation, and it is also used to treat wounds and skin infections. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and it is also used in topical preparations such as creams and ointments.
